data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"c2cc-e3c4","generatedAt":"2026-04-16T04:06:22Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","mode":"lightweight","epic":{"title":"Directory size monitor: advisory session-start hook with auto-ticketing","successCriteria":["A session-start hook scans all git-tracked files, counts files per directory, and identifies directories exceeding the configured threshold","Directories matching .gitignore entries (via git ls-files), .git/, and a configurable exclusion list in dso-config.conf are excluded from scanning","When a directory exceeds the threshold and no open ticket tagged dir:<path> exists, a P4 epic is auto-created with a descriptive title and the dir:<path> tag","No duplicate tickets are created for the same directory \u2014 deduplication checks open tickets only, allowing re-flagging after a previous ticket is closed","The hook prints an advisory summary of flagged directories to stderr without blocking session startup","Threshold and exclusion list are configurable via dso-config.conf keys (directory_monitor.file_threshold default 30, directory_monitor.exclude_dirs default .git)"]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]}}
